title: Nostalgia Modpack
description: a modpack that replicates the beta days of minecraft, it even readds the farlands!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e3f5e0cbacbb003b72b9260e89265081e33c7a.png)
# A modpack that replicates the beta days of Minecraft, it even readds the farlands!

### An SMP for this modpack is in the works! Join the discord server to get early acsess!


Features:
- all of the beta textures
- same whtih sound effects
- all of the old animations
- old main menu and loading screen from beta
- Adds some bugs from beta
- Beta Lighting Engine
- Beta World Generation
- The ather dimention (automaticly included in modpack)
- and a lot more that I don't wanna list here

Current Known Bugs:
#### None!

### Make sure to apply the included texture pack before making a new world.

If you want to teleport to the farlands, run the following command: /tp @p 12550821 100 100
